rules: Use Playfair Display ONLY for main page titles and major section headers.
Use Manrope for all data tables, inputs, and body text.
Captions and labels must be uppercase with wide tracking (0.05em).

foreground.description: Dark Green-Black - Softer than pure black

cards.style: bg-white border border-border/60 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium

inputs.style: bg-background border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-11

navigation.sidebar: bg-[#344E41] text-white w-64 hidden md:flex flex-col
navigation.sidebar_link: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors text-sm font-medium

visual_enhancers.gradients: None. Use solid earthy tones or very subtle noise textures.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle grain on the main background if possible to enhance the 'organic' feel.

general: Implement the 'Organic & Earthy' theme strictly. Avoid default blue/purple SaaS colors.
Use 'Playfair Display' for all H1-H3 headings to give the Ayurvedic premium feel.
Ensure the dashboard uses the 'Bento Grid' layout (Mode B) for high density data but with generous internal padding.
Inventory Analytics must visually distinguish Fast vs Slow moving goods using the specified color codes.
Use Shadcn components but override the default radius to 'rounded-xl' and use the custom color palette.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.

specific_pages.login: Split screen. Left side: Login form with 'Playfair Display' welcome text. Right side: High-quality hospital/herb image with an earthy overlay.
specific_pages.dashboard: Top row: Key metrics (Patients, Revenue, Inventory Health). Middle: Split view of Appointments (Calendar) and Fast/Slow Moving Goods (Chart). Bottom: Recent Activity.
specific_pages.inventory: Table view with status badges (Fast/Slow). Use 'lucide-react' icons for categories (Leaf for herbs, Pill for medicines).
specific_pages.ip_op_checkin: Clean forms with clear separation between IP (Room selection) and OP (Token generation).

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
